name: fallguy
description: Fall Guy Consulting plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: plumbline
plugins.description: Code that runs true under agentic maintenance. Ships the methodology rules (manifesto, style guide, cheatsheet), an idempotent affirm skill, a multi-language lint binary (comment hygiene, @source: validity, @blessed-invariant: test coverage), a PostToolUse hook, and an /plumbline:audit skill.
